failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, so the required product evidence was unavailable and the agent could not determine whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent attempted the planned ProductCatalogSearch call, and the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, timed out after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation error, guardrail block, or reasoning error over tool output. The failure was not resolved later; the agent simply reported that the task could not be completed.
